description:
Indentation Navigation addon.
It allows NVDA users to navigate by indentation level or offset of lines or paragraphs.
Also while editing source code in many programming languages, it allows to jump between the lines of the same indentation level, as well as quickly find lines with greater or lesser indentation level.

translations.description:
Indentation Navigation addon.
It allows NVDA users to navigate by indentation level or offset of lines or paragraphs.
Also while editing source code in many programming languages, it allows to jump between the lines of the same indentation level, as well as quickly find lines with greater or lesser indentation level.

Indentation Navigation addon.
It allows NVDA users to navigate by indentation level or offset of lines or paragraphs.
Also while editing source code in many programming languages, it allows to jump between the lines of the same indentation level, as well as quickly find lines with greater or lesser indentation level.

Indentation Navigation addon.
It allows NVDA users to navigate by indentation level or offset of lines or paragraphs.
Also while editing source code in many programming languages, it allows to jump between the lines of the same indentation level, as well as quickly find lines with greater or lesser indentation level.

Girinti Dolaşımı eklentisi.
NVDA kullanıcılarının satır veya paragrafların girinti düzeyine ya da uzaklığına göre gezinmesine olanak tanır.
Ayrıca birçok programlama dilinde kaynak kodu düzenlerken, aynı girinti seviyesindeki satırlar arasında geçiş yapılmasına ve daha büyük veya daha az girinti seviyesine sahip satırların hızla bulunmasına olanak tanır.

Додаток Навігація за відступами.
Дозволяє користувачам NVDA здійснювати навігацію за рівнем відступу або зміщенням рядків чи абзаців.
Також під час редагування вихідного коду на багатьох мовах програмування цей додаток дозволяє переходити між рядками одного рівня відступу, а також швидко знаходити рядки з більшим чи меншим рівнем відступу.

Дополнение для навигации по отступам.
Позволяет пользователям NVDA ориентироваться по уровню отступа или смещению строк или абзацев.
Кроме того, при редактировании исходного кода на многих языках программирования дополнение позволяет переключаться между строками с одинаковым уровнем отступа, а также быстро находить строки с большим или меньшим уровнем отступа.

Indentation Navigation addon.
It allows NVDA users to navigate by indentation level or offset of lines or paragraphs.
Also while editing source code in many programming languages, it allows to jump between the lines of the same indentation level, as well as quickly find lines with greater or lesser indentation level.

Addon de navegação por indentação.
Permite aos utilizadores do NVDA navegar por nível de indentação ou compensação de linhas ou parágrafos.
Nos navegadores, permite encontrar rapidamente parágrafos com o mesmo deslocamento a partir da margem esquerda do ecrã, como comentários de primeiro nível numa árvore hierárquica de comentários.
Além disso, ao editar o código-fonte, em muitas linguagens de programação, permite saltar entre as linhas do mesmo nível de indentação, bem como localizar rapidamente as linhas com maior ou menor nível de indentação.

Indentation Navigation addon.
It allows NVDA users to navigate by indentation level or offset of lines or paragraphs.
Also while editing source code in many programming languages, it allows to jump between the lines of the same indentation level, as well as quickly find lines with greater or lesser indentation level.

Indentation Navigation addon.
It allows NVDA users to navigate by indentation level or offset of lines or paragraphs.
Also while editing source code in many programming languages, it allows to jump between the lines of the same indentation level, as well as quickly find lines with greater or lesser indentation level.

Добавка за навигация по отстъпи.
Тази добавка позволява на потребителите на NVDA да се придвижват по нивото на отстъпа или по определен брой редове или абзаци.
Също така, докато се редактира изходен код на много езици за програмиране, той позволява да се прескача между редовете със същото ниво на отстъп, както и да се намират бързо редове с по-голямо или по-малко ниво на отстъп.

Indentation Navigation addon.
It allows NVDA users to navigate by indentation level or offset of lines or paragraphs.
Also while editing source code in many programming languages, it allows to jump between the lines of the same indentation level, as well as quickly find lines with greater or lesser indentation level.

Navigation bei Einrückungen:
Sie können in Einrückungsebene oder Versatz von Zeilen oder Absätzen navigieren.
Auch bei der Bearbeitung von Quellcode in vielen Programmiersprachen können Sie zwischen den Zeilen der gleichen Einrückungsebene springen sowie Zeilen mit größerer oder kleinerer Einrückungsebene schneller finden.

Indentation Navigation addon.
It allows NVDA users to navigate by indentation level or offset of lines or paragraphs.
Also while editing source code in many programming languages, it allows to jump between the lines of the same indentation level, as well as quickly find lines with greater or lesser indentation level.

Add-on Indentation Navigation.
Ele permite que os usuários do NVDA naveguem por nível de recuo ou deslocamento de linhas ou parágrafos.
Além disso, ao editar o código-fonte em muitas linguagens de programação, ele permite saltar entre as linhas do mesmo nível de indentação, bem como localizar rapidamente linhas com nível de indentação maior ou menor.

Complemento de navegación por sangría.
Permite a los usuarios de NVDA navegar por nivel de sangría o desplazamiento de líneas y párrafos.
Además, al editar el código fuente de muchos lenguajes de programación, permite saltar entre líneas con el mismo nivel de sangría, así como encontrar líneas con más o menos nivel de sangría.

Sisennysnavigoinnin lisäosa.
Sen avulla NVDA:n käyttäjät voivat siirtyä sisennystason, rivipoikkeamien tai kappaleiden mukaan.
Lisäksi se mahdollistaa useiden ohjelmointikielien lähdekoodia muokattaessa siirtymisen samalla sisennystasolla olevien rivien välillä sekä sellaisten rivien nopean etsimisen, joilla on suurempi tai pienempi sisennystaso.

Indentation Navigation addon.
It allows NVDA users to navigate by indentation level or offset of lines or paragraphs.
Also while editing source code in many programming languages, it allows to jump between the lines of the same indentation level, as well as quickly find lines with greater or lesser indentation level.

缩进导航插件。
可以让 NVDA 用户通过行或段落的缩进级别或偏移量进行导航。
在浏览器中，使用该插件可以快速导航距屏幕左边缘具有相同偏移量的段落，例如在具有层级结构的帖子评论区，您可以仅导航同级的评论。
此外，在编程开发中，该插件可以用来快速在相同缩进级别的行之间跳转，以及快速跳转到具有更大或更小缩进级别的行。

Extension de navigation par indentation.
Cette extension permet aux utilisateurs de NVDA de naviguer par niveau d'indentation ou par décalage de lignes ou de paragraphes.
Aussi lors de l'édition du code source dans de nombreux langages de programmation, il permet de sauter entre les lignes du même niveau d'indentation, ainsi que de trouver rapidement des lignes avec un niveau d'indentation plus ou moins élevé.
